Dinosaur Game

Do you remember the T-Rex in Google Chrome when your internet connection went out? Now, you can play it online, too. Dinosaur Game is a free-running game where there is no finish line. We warn you in advance that this is a challenging game.

Play Dinosaur Game Online

Loading game...
About Dinosaur Game

Do you remember the T-Rex in Google Chrome when your internet connection went out? Now, you can play it online, too. Dinosaur Game is a free-running game where there is no finish line. We warn you in advance that this is a challenging game. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Dinosaur Game in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Arcade game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Dinosaur Game for free?

Yes. Dinosaur Game is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Dinosaur Game?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
